description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided advertising board mounted on a single vertical pole with a square base. The board features two large rectangular panels, each displaying a different advertisement in Russian, with one side promoting Samsung Galaxy Tab 3 and mobile internet, and the other side advertising a mobile communication service. The panels are made of a flat, likely metal or composite material, with printed graphics and text in green, white, and blue tones. The supporting pole appears to be metallic or painted wood, showing some weathering, and is anchored into a solid, dark-colored base for stability. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative frame, focusing on maximizing the visible area for advertisements. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components, and the board is intended for outdoor urban environments such as sidewalks or roadside areas.
description: A double-sided, freestanding advertising board on a single pole with printed Russian advertisements, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a green and white advertisement for Samsung Galaxy Tab 3 and mobile internet, with clear branding and a SIM card graphic.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the board and the central supporting pole, with no visible content or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a different green advertisement focused on mobile communication services, with a hand holding a smartphone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the supporting pole, mirroring view 1.
attribute_frame_design: thin, flat metal or composite border with no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed posters for mobile internet and communication services, with product images and Russian text
